title: Deskit Laminating Pouches A4, Glossy, 120 Sheets, 100 Microns - Clear and Durable Presentations - Flexible Rigidity for Everyday Use
features: LAMINTING POUCHES A4 HIGH QUALITY: laminating pouches to give you a professional glossy finish to make your project to stand out. A4 (216x303mm).
LARGE PACK LAMINTING POUCHES : Giving you greater value for money, perfect for busy offices and handling multi-projects.
FLEXIBLE: 100 Microns is the ideal rigidity for everyday use, giving your documents flexibility, great for documents, tags or kids artwork.

EASY TO USE: Our premium quality laminating pouches are easy to use in any hot laminating machine. They also come with rounded corners, 2mm border rim and a sealed end to align your sheet within the pouch to facilitate a perfect finish
PROTECTS : Deskit offers great protection and durability across its full range
description: Product Description A4 Laminating Pouches - FLEXI100 DESKit laminating pouches will allow you to achieve a professional and long-lasting finish for your project. Our 100 Microns pouches will provide you with the best rigidity for everyday use including documents, posters and school resources. The glossy finish brings out vivid colours for extra impact. DESKit makes laminating an enjoyable and easy experience from start to finish!
